name: @appstrate/connect-formlogin-test
description: Phase 3 reference — declarative form-login that captures a session cookie (`connect.steps` cookie extractor). A lespac/orgabusiness-shaped flow against https://formlogin.test.appstrate.dev: POST the credentials form, capture `JSESSIONID` + `AWSALB` from Set-Cookie, and inject them as a `Cookie` header. No untrusted code — the platform engine drives the chain and substitutes `{{username}}`/`{{password}}` at the boundary. Used by the connect E2E to confirm cookie-capture connects end-to-end against a fake upstream.
author: Appstrate

password.description: Account password — never seen by any tool; the platform engine substitutes it into the login POST at the boundary.
